name: cli-anything-qgis
tagline: Stateful CLI exposing the real QGIS runtime for project, layer, feature, layout, and export operations.
verdict: Well-structured, actionable QGIS CLI reference with concrete commands and worked examples, and no security issues found. Weak spots: no guidance for missing QGIS/PyQGIS or command failures, no rerun/duplication guidance for feature or layer creation, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description states capabilities (projects, layers, exports) but no explicit 'use when' trigger phrasing.
Requirements list QGIS/PyQGIS/Python but no step addresses missing QGIS, import failures, or command errors.
feature add / layer create-vector examples don't mention duplicate-effect risk if rerun.
